subcodes.first_line: O thou wanderer in the wilderness of the love of God! Thy letter hath been received, and intense grief was felt at the afflictions and tribulations that have befallen thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته صحرای محبت الله مکتوب واصل و از مصائب و مشقات وارده نهایت تاثر حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
